display_text: Phantom Lancer Aghanim's Scepter: Phantom Rush creates Juxtapose illusions when rushing through enemies and generates an additional illusion every 600 units rushed. This upgrade counters single-target burst damage by overwhelming enemies with illusions, forcing them to deal with multiple threats. It enhances Phantom Lancer's role as a chaotic teamfight presence and split-pusher by increasing his illusion generation during engagements.
search_text: Phantom Lancer Aghanim Scepter anti-burst illusion generation split-push teamfight chaos

display_text: Phantom Lancer Aghanim's Shard: Grants Juxtapose an active ability that provides invisibility and movement speed while creating a decoy illusion. This upgrade counters detection-heavy lineups by allowing Phantom Lancer to reposition safely, evade ganks, and confuse enemies with deceptive illusions. It shifts his role toward a more slippery and unpredictable playstyle, enhancing his survivability and initiation potential.
search_text: Phantom Lancer Aghanim Shard anti-detection invisibility reposition decoy illusion escape initiation
